daos 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference

Validate and resolve file paths

require_files.Rd

Expands paths using glue::glue() (so {0:9} generates ten paths), checks that every file exists, and returns a named character vector ready to pipe into read_files(). Aborts immediately if any file is missing.

Usage

require_files(paths, .names = NULL, .envir = parent.frame())

Arguments

paths

A character vector of file paths. Glue syntax ({}) is supported for compact range expansion.

.names

Optional character vector of names to assign to the returned paths. Defaults to the file name without extension.

.envir

Environment used for glue interpolation. Default is the calling frame.

Value

A named character vector of validated file paths.

See also

read_files(), bind_files()

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# Validate ten files at once using glue expansion:
require_files("data/dat{0:9}.parquet")

# Pipe directly into read_files():
require_files("data/dat{0:9}.parquet") |> read_files()

# Full pipeline: validate -> read -> bind:
require_files("data/dat{0:9}.parquet") |>
  read_files() |>
  bind_files()
} # }
